ASME_PressureTemperatureRatings.note_min_temp: temp='-29' represents the ASME 'Min. to 38°C' rating row. This pressure applies from the minimum permissible temperature (typically -29°C) up to 38°C inclusive.

Standard.title: Pipe Flanges and Flanged Fittings NPS 1/2 Through NPS 24

MaterialGroup.examples: A216 WCC · A352 LCC · A350 LF6 Cl.2 · A203 B/E

Standard.title: Large Diameter Steel Flanges NPS 26 Through NPS 60
Standard.note_class75: Class 75 is exclusive to B16.47 Series A large-diameter flanges. Classes 1500 and 2500 are not covered by B16.47.

MaterialGroup.examples: A216 WCC · A352 LCC · A350 LF6 Cl.2 · A203 B/E
